title: glaucium oxylobum var. paucilobatum
intro: Glaucium oxylobum var. paucilobatum is a lesser-known variety of the Glaucium oxylobum plant, a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Glaucium oxylobum var. paucilobatum include its ability to relieve coughs, soothe skin irritations, and aid in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant's roots and flowers are used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
